conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected with G, H, and B. G and I agreed on a clear, usable trust signal and promised to share observations, which felt practical and dependable. H and I built rapport through a mutual tiny test and a 50/50 understanding if we both cooperated, which felt sincere. B’s steady, upfront commitment to cooperate in round one and check in afterward also resonated with how I want to play.

I made small, explicit agreements with a few people — cooperate round one with B, the tiny-test then 50/50 plan with H, and a two-tap signal/info-sharing arrangement with G. I trust G and H most going into the game; I feel least connected to I and don’t have a reason to rely on them yet.
